title: Perfected Vanilla
description: This mod pack contains every mods you need to have your game fully optimized and have tons of new features for it to be perfect without any changes to the actual content!
body:
This modpack contains everything you need for a perfect vanilla experience. You have every optimization you would want, optifine features, as well as tons of other things.



Some important things that can be configured if needed:
 
  -Ambient Sound mod (disabled by default) 
    can be activated if the player likes to hear ambiant souds like birds and bugs

  -SuperBetterGrass (disabled by default/ not compatible with PBR)
      allows you to connect grass over several block like optifines "fancy" grass
      it's also better since it connects smoothly grass and dirt blocks
  
  -Visuality (some things enabled by default)
    Gives you the possibility to add particule effects to enhanced the experience

  -Distance Horizon (disabled by default) 
  Allows you to have extremly high render distance thanks to the use of LODs
  You may also need to toogle "Disable Vanilla Fog" in Advanced settings > Graphics > Fog

  -Cull Leaves (diabled by default)
  Makes leaves cull way more making trees almost transparent and improves performance.

  -Bridging Mod (disabled by default)
  Enables Bedrock bridging.


Advised setup for Classic look enhanced (enabled by default):

    Ressource pack (in order):
   
      sus_sand (optional for fun)
    
      FreshAnimations (optional)
    
      Skulls+on+Infested (optional)
    
      lambdabettergrass
   
      minecraft/supporteatinganimation
    
      Default Connected Textures

      NEAPIK RTX JAVA
    
      Fabric Mods
    
      Default
 
  
    Shaderpack:
    
      Complementary Reimagined (preconfigured)


Advised setup for Trailer look: 

    Ressource pack (in order):
    
      Bare Bones X Eating Animations
   
      minecraft/supporteatinganimation
    
      Bare Bones X Fresh Animations
    
      FreshAnimations
   
      Skulls+on+Infested (optional)
   
      Default Connected Textures
    
      Trailers Vision
   
      Fabric Mods
   
      Default

    Shaderpack:

      BSL (preconfigured)



Retribution:

SuperBetterGrass made by dimadencep : https://github.com/dima-dencep/super-better-grass


NEAPIK RTX JAVA made by NEAPIK : https://www.patreon.com/posts/neapik-rtx-java-69417326
